allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: initialize nestjs 11 project with typescript strict mode

- Configure TypeScript strict mode with path aliases
- Setup ESLint 9 flat config + Prettier
- Add environment configuration with Joi validation
- Implement standard response format { code, message, data }
- Add ResponseTransformInterceptor for consistent responses
- Add AllExceptionsFilter for error handling
- Configure Swagger/OpenAPI at /api/docs
- Add CORS with configurable origins
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(database\): implement Phase 02 database and Supabase integration

- Add TypeORM with PostgreSQL driver and Supabase JS SDK
- Create 11 entity files: Language, User, UserLanguage, Lesson, Exercise,
  UserProgress, UserExerciseAttempt, Subscription, AiConversation,
  AiConversationMessage, DeviceToken
- Configure DatabaseModule with connection pooling and SSL
- Add TypeORM data source for migrations CLI
- Create initial schema migration with enums and indexes
- Create RLS policies migration for row-level security
- Add language seed data \(10 languages\)
- Implement SupabaseStorageService for audio file storage
- Add migration npm scripts
- Create SQL file for manual Supabase SQL Editor execution
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(core\): implement Phase 04 core modules with User and Language APIs

- Add UserModule with CRUD operations and language association
- Create UserController with endpoints: GET /users/me, PATCH /users/me, POST /users/languages, DELETE /users/languages/:id
- Implement UserService with profile management and language association logic
- Add 5 DTOs for user operations: UpdateProfileDto, GetProfileResponseDto, AddLanguageDto, UserLanguageDto, RemoveLanguageResponseDto
- Add LanguageModule with language listing functionality
- Create LanguageController with endpoint: GET /languages
- Implement LanguageService with language retrieval and validation
- Add 2 DTOs for language operations: LanguageDto, GetLanguagesResponseDto
- Register UserModule and LanguageModule in AppModule
- Update phase-04-core-modules.md status to DONE
EOF
\)")
